# nodus-store-sql

> RunStore (optimistic locking), EventStore (append-only), JobStore (atomic claiming). Tables: nodus_runs, nodus_events, nodus_jobs. Sync + async (aiosqlite).
> Part of the [Masterplan Infinite Weave](https://www.the-master-plan.com/) ecosystem.
> Created by Shawn Knight.

**Notes:** SQLAlchemy required. No Alembic; create_all() for dev bootstrap.

## Status

v0.1.0 — prepared, not yet published. All GitHub repos aligned at github.com/Masterplanner25.

## Install

```
pip install nodus-store-sql  # once published
pip install -e . --no-deps  # dev install
```

## Ecosystem

- nodus-lang: https://github.com/Masterplanner25/Nodus
- nodus-sdk (unified install): https://github.com/Masterplanner25/nodus-sdk
- All packages: https://github.com/Masterplanner25
- Masterplan Infinite Weave: https://www.the-master-plan.com/

## Creator & Ecosystem

Created by Shawn Knight — [Masterplan Infinite Weave](https://www.the-master-plan.com/)

- [Why I'm Building A.I.N.D.Y.](https://medium.com/masterplan-infinite-weave/2025-chatgpt-ai-the-duality-of-progress-why-im-building-a-i-n-d-y-or-any-tool-really-a138f7860fba) — strategic context for this stack
- [Duality of Progress: Master Index](https://medium.com/masterplan-infinite-weave/2025-chatgpt-ai-the-duality-of-progress-master-index-strategic-manifesto-4c96cf98348a) — the framework this project serves
- [AI Search Optimization](https://medium.com/masterplan-infinite-weave/2025-chatgpt-case-study-ai-search-optimization-0f8cd5e78d4f) — the discoverability philosophy behind this ecosystem
